headline: Here Are Some of the Worst-Performing Stocks Today
summary: Consumer discretionary stocks are the hardest-hit in today’s selloff. Shares of cruise company Carnival Corp, leggings maker lululemon athletica and hotel operator Marriott International were among the worst-performing members of the S&P 500 in Monday morning trading.

raw.headline: Here Are Some of the Worst-Performing Stocks Today
raw.summary: Consumer discretionary stocks are the hardest-hit in today’s selloff. Shares of cruise company Carnival Corp, leggings maker lululemon athletica and hotel operator Marriott International were among the worst-performing members of the S&P 500 in Monday morning trading.

headline: Lululemon founder escalates boardroom feud
summary: Chip Wilson, founder and major shareholder of lululemon athletica, has called on the company’s Board of Directors to implement significant changes, citing a “disconnect” between the company’s creative direction and the board’s oversight.
